languages.text: Крепкий алкогольный напиток. Некоторые его разновидности считаются элитными, другие — лишь пойло для простолюдинов.

traits.locale_text: Крепкий алкогольный напиток. Некоторые его разновидности считаются элитными, другие — лишь пойло для простолюдинов.
Крепкий алкогольный напиток. Некоторые его разновидности считаются элитными, другие — лишь пойло для простолюдинов.

languages.text: A strong liquor that comes in many varieties. Some are fit for nobles, and the others, well, they're swill for commoners.
languages.original_text: Крепкий алкогольный напиток. Некоторые его разновидности считаются элитными, другие — лишь пойло для простолюдинов.

traits.locale_text: A strong liquor that comes in many varieties. Some are fit for nobles, the others are good only for the most undemanding drinker.
A strong liquor that comes in many varieties. Some are fit for nobles, the others are good only for the most undemanding drinker.
A strong liquor that comes in many varieties. Some are fit for nobles, and the others, well, they're swill for commoners.

A strong liquor that comes in many varieties. Some are fit for nobles, and the others, well, they're swill for commoners.

languages.text: Ein starker Schnaps, den es in vielen Varianten gibt. Einige sind für Adlige geeignet, die anderen sind Gesöff für das gemeine Volk.
languages.original_text: A strong liquor that comes in many varieties. Some are fit for nobles, and the others, well, they're swill for commoners.

traits.locale_text: Ein starker Schnaps, den es in vielen Varianten gibt. Einige sind für Adlige geeignet, die anderen sind Gesöff für das gemeine Volk.

languages.text: Il s'agit d'une liqueur forte qui se décline en de nombreuses variétés. Certaines sont réservées aux nobles, d'autres aux roturiers.
languages.original_text: A strong liquor that comes in many varieties. Some are fit for nobles, and the others, well, they're swill for commoners.

traits.locale_text: Il s'agit d'une liqueur forte qui se décline en de nombreuses variétés. Certaines sont réservées aux nobles, d'autres aux roturiers.

languages.text: Un licor fuerte que viene en muchas variedades. Algunas son aptas para nobles, y las otras, bueno, son bazofia para plebeyos.
languages.original_text: A strong liquor that comes in many varieties. Some are fit for nobles, and the others, well, they're swill for commoners.

traits.locale_text: Un licor fuerte que viene en muchas variedades. Algunas son aptas para nobles, y las otras, bueno, son bazofia para plebeyos.

languages.text: Birçok çeşidi olan sert bir likör. Bazıları soylular için uygundur, diğerleri ise sıradan insanlar için.
languages.original_text: A strong liquor that comes in many varieties. Some are fit for nobles, and the others, well, they're swill for commoners.

traits.locale_text: Birçok çeşidi olan sert bir likör. Bazıları soylular için uygundur, diğerleri ise sıradan insanlar için.
